title: EveryInc/compound-engineering-plugin
friendlyTitle: Compound Engineering plugin helps coding agents share workflows
summary: Every’s Compound Engineering plugin is a cross-agent plugin for Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, and related coding tools. The repo is highly starred, recently active, and focused on making agentic coding workflows more portable across environments.
friendlySummary: This GitHub project provides a plugin for AI coding tools such as Claude Code, Codex, and Cursor.
whyItMatters: Teams experimenting with coding agents can use it as a shared plugin layer instead of rebuilding workflow conventions separately for each tool. That helps standardize prompts, commands, and project automation across multiple AI coding clients.
friendlyWhyItMatters: It can help teams keep their AI coding setup more consistent across different tools.
